description: Triggering evals: does the Pathfinder skill fire when it should, and stay quiet when it shouldn't? Negatives are deliberate near-misses that share keywords (test, coverage, journey) but need a different tool. Pathfinder is for UI/E2E journey coverage mapping — NOT unit tests, API tests, or backend-only work.

queries.query: Map the user journeys in my Next.js app and show me which ones have Playwright coverage.
queries.rationale: Core use case: journey discovery + UI coverage visualization.

queries.query: Which end-to-end user flows in this iOS app are actually covered by our XCUITests?
queries.rationale: UI test coverage question across journeys.

queries.query: I have line coverage at 80% but no idea which real user flows are tested end to end. Can you show me a coverage map?
queries.rationale: The exact gap Pathfinder fills: journeys vs line coverage.

queries.query: Generate a Mermaid diagram of our checkout flow showing tested vs untested steps.
queries.rationale: Coverage visualization of a journey.

queries.query: Write E2E tests for the untested steps in our signup journey using Cypress.
queries.rationale: Filling UI coverage gaps with framework-correct tests.

queries.query: Audit our Flutter app's UI test coverage and tell me where the biggest gaps are.
queries.rationale: UI coverage audit for a supported mobile framework.

queries.query: We finished a testing sprint — regenerate the coverage diagrams and show progress since the baseline.
queries.rationale: Before/after coverage reporting (Blaze/Summit).

queries.query: Set up a coverage map for our React Native app's onboarding and payment flows with Detox tests for the gaps.
queries.rationale: Journey mapping + Detox test generation.

queries.query: I want a living map of every user journey in this web app and a way to track which are tested over time.
queries.rationale: Pathfinder's headline value: a living journey/coverage map.

queries.query: Show me the untested user paths in our Espresso-tested Android app so I can prioritize.
queries.rationale: UI coverage gap analysis for Android/Espresso.

queries.query: Write a unit test for my formatCurrency() utility function.
queries.rationale: Near-miss: it's a 'test' but a unit test, explicitly out of scope.

queries.query: Our /api/orders endpoint returns 500 sometimes — help me write integration tests for the backend.
queries.rationale: Near-miss: API/backend tests, not UI journeys.

queries.query: Increase our Jest line coverage from 70% to 90%.
queries.rationale: Near-miss: 'coverage' but line/unit coverage, not journey coverage.

queries.query: Plan the user journey for a new onboarding feature we're designing — what screens should it have?
queries.rationale: Near-miss: 'user journey' as UX design, not test coverage mapping.

queries.query: This Playwright test is flaky — figure out why it intermittently fails and fix it.
queries.rationale: Near-miss: Playwright, but debugging one flaky test, not coverage mapping.

queries.query: Review my pull request for security issues.
queries.rationale: Unrelated: code review / security.

queries.query: Set up a CI pipeline that runs our test suite on every push.
queries.rationale: Near-miss: tests + CI, but infra setup, not coverage mapping.

queries.query: Generate an architecture diagram of our microservices.
queries.rationale: Near-miss: 'diagram', but architecture, not coverage.

queries.query: Run the existing test suite and tell me if it passes.
queries.rationale: Near-miss: running tests, no journey/coverage mapping involved.

queries.query: Add load testing for our checkout API to see how it handles 10k concurrent users.
queries.rationale: Near-miss: 'checkout' + 'testing', but performance/API, not UI coverage.
